message:
test(locale): add 32 integration tests for locale_abi

Covers setlocale (C/POSIX/empty/query), localeconv, nl_langinfo
(CODESET/RADIXCHAR/THOUSEP), gettext/dgettext/ngettext identity,
textdomain, bindtextdomain, newlocale/uselocale/freelocale/duplocale,
nl_langinfo_l, and catopen/catgets/catclose stubs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
